description.value: You lead others by teaching and imparting insights onto them. Whenever an ally selects you as the target of their attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Follow the Expert], you increase the circumstance bonus they receive to their skill check by an additional +1, or an additional +2 if you have master proficiency rank or higher (for a total of +3 for expert, +5 for master, and +6 for legendary).
